name: Haydn: Harmoniemesse
artist: Joseph Haydn, Les Arts Florissants, William Christie, Mélissa Petit, Beth Taylor, Bastien Rimondi, Andreas Wolf

tracks.t: Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: I. Kyrie. Poco adagio
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: IIa. Gloria. Vivace assai
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: IIb. Gratias agimus. Allegreto
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: IIc. Quoniam tu solus sanctus. Allegro spiritoso
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: IIIa. Credo. Vivace
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: IIIb. Et incarnatus est. Adagio
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: IIIc. Et resurrexit. Vivace
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: IIId. Et vitam venturi. Vivace
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: IV. Sanctus. Adagio. Allegro
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: Va. Benedictus. Allegro molto. Allegro
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: Vb. Osanna. Allegro
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: VIa. Agnus Dei. Adagio
Harmoniemesse in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:14: VIb. Dona nobis pacem. Allegro con spirito
Missa brevis Sancti Joannis de Deo in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:7: I. Kyrie. Adagio
Missa brevis Sancti Joannis de Deo in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:7: II. Gloria. Allegro di molto
Missa brevis Sancti Joannis de Deo in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:7: III. Credo. Allegro. Adagio. Allegro
Missa brevis Sancti Joannis de Deo in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:7: IV. Sanctus. Allegro
Missa brevis Sancti Joannis de Deo in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:7: V. Benedictus. Moderato. Allegro
Missa brevis Sancti Joannis de Deo in B-Flat Major, Hob XXII:7: VI. Agnus Dei. Adagio
